title: Resolve pane input and capture evidence
prompt: Find the test-owned pane titled `doctrine-test-peer`, send the literal text `ping` without submitting it, resize it to 40 columns, then capture text or ANSI evidence of the resulting terminal state. Do not use raw tmux.
setup: Host creates one joined test pane and records its raw id.
expectedOutcome: The inspected raw pane is mutated, input remains unsubmitted, and minimal terminal evidence is captured.

pi: current then panes, pane_send_keys, pane_resize, snapshot
